Switch to T-Mobile in just 15 minutes.

Start your switch
Call 1-833-452-2736

Check out in 15 minutes per line. 

According to Ookla® Speedtest®. Best: Based on analysis by Ookla® of Speedtest Intelligence® data 2H 2025. Ookla trademarks used under license and reprinted with permission.

Median check-out time using T-Life app; activation may take longer (e.g., with locked phones). Device activation, data, and number transfer will take additional time.

APPLE

iPhone 17 Pro On Us. No trade-in needed.

Get the ultimate Pro when you switch to T-Mobile and bring your number on an Experience More or Experience Beyond plan.

Shop now
With 24 monthly bill credits when you switch to T-Mobile on a qualifying plan. For well-qualified customers; plus taxes & $35 device connection charge.
5-YEAR GUARANTEE

Coming from AT&T? Check your bill.

T-Mobile keeps your Experience plan price the same for 5 years–giving you great value, consistent benefits, and peace of mind.

Plus, for a limited time, get $400 when you switch and bring your own phone.

Explore plans
5-year price guarantee: Exclusions like taxes and fees apply. Guarantees monthly price of on-network talk, text & 5G data on an Experience plan. Get up to $400: After rebate via virtual prepaid Mastercard. Allow 6-8 weeks. Qualifying plan required.
GET SAVINGS THAT LAST

T-Mobile customers had the lowest wireless bills.

Vs. Verizon and AT&T over the past 5 years.

Switch and save
Based on HarrisX Billing Snapshots.

Switch in just 15 minutes.

Join how and when you want—right here or in the T-Life app.

 

 

 

No trade-in needed on our best deals.

For a limited time, get an incredible deal on the phone you want without trading yours in—simply keep the phone you have.

 

 

 

FREE same-day phone delivery.

For a limited time, get your new phone delivered for FREE the same day you switch. Same-day delivery rolling out soon to 5G Home Internet. Check availability.

 

 

 

Switch in just 15 minutes.

Check out in 15 minutes or less per line. Device activation, data & number transfer will take additional time.

Free Same-Day Delivery

Free Same-Day Delivery: Phone delivery for eligible new accounts. Home Internet delivery for new and existing customers activating an eligible new Home Internet line in a standalone transaction. See if same-day delivery is an option during checkout. Plus tax. Same-day delivery is not available in all areas and may not be available due to order cutoff times. Weather, traffic, driver availability and safety, and other uncontrollable conditions may affect delivery window.

Shop our best deals.

APPLE

Get iPhone 17 On Us.
No trade-in needed.

Shop now for Apple iPhone 17
More delightful. More durable. Yours when you switch to T-Mobile and bring your number on an Experience More or Experience Beyond plan. With 24 monthly bill credits.
Limited-time offer
BRING YOUR OWN DEVICE

Your phone. Your number. Get up to $400 On Us.

Switch now
Get up to $400 when you switch to T-Mobile, bring your own device, and keep your number on an eligible plan. After rebate via virtual prepaid Mastercard. Allow 6-8 weeks.
Available for 55+, Military & First Responders too
APPLE

iPhone 15—Get 4 On Us. Plus, 4 lines for $25/line/mo. No trade-in needed.

Shop now
Experience everyday premium. Switch to T-Mobile and get 4 phones On Us when you bring your number on our Essentials promo plan. With AutoPay; plus taxes and fees. Via 24 monthly bill credits.
No trade-in needed
HIGH-VALUE DEAL

Free select smartphones.

Shop now
Yours FREE when you add a line on most plans. Via 24 monthly bill credits.
No trade-in needed
SAMSUNG

New Galaxy S26 Ultra for under $200. 

Shop now
Experience the world’s first phone with built-in privacy display. Get it when you activate a line on an Experience More or Experience Beyond plan. With 24 monthly bill credits. 
No trade-in needed
MOTOROLA

New motorola razr On Us. No trade-in needed.

Shop now
Endless ways to capture. Yours when you activate a new line on an Experience More plan. Via 24 monthly bill credits.
FAMILY FREEDOM

Switch and get up to $800/line to pay off your old phones.

Check it out
When you trade & upgrade up to 4 phones. Via virtual prepaid card. New device, qualifying credit, service, eligible trade-in & port required. Card typically takes 15 days.
No trade-in needed
MOTOROLA

Save $1100 on the new motorola razr fold.

Shop now for motorola razr fold.
Set a new fold standard. Get yours when you activate a new line on an Experience Beyond plan. With 24 monthly bill credits.
Low down payment
APPLE

iPhone 15.
Get up to 50% off. 

Shop now
Shop online now and get up to $315 off via 24 monthly bill credits when you add a line on a qualifying plan.
SAME-DAY INTERNET

Get the fastest 5G home internet delivered the same day with free DoorDash delivery.

Powered by DoorDash.

Learn more , opens in a new window
Source: Fastest according to Ookla Speedtest Intelligence data, 2H 2025. All rights reserved. Available for most Internet-eligible customers, see if it’s an option during checkout.

If you cancel entire account before receiving 24 credits, credits stop and balance on required finance agreement is due; for phones, contact us. Bill credits end if you pay off device early. For well-qualified customers, plus tax & $35 device connection charge.

Shop all deals

Compare our most popular plans.

$56.67/mo.

per phone line for 3 lines with AutoPay, plus taxes and fees. 

Upgrade your phone every year and get the best entertainment bundle in wireless with our most value-packed plan. Plus, your monthly price for talk, text, and data is guaranteed for 5 years. Exclusions like taxes and fees apply.

Learn more

Guarantees monthly price of on-network talk, text, & data on an Experience plan. Price with 3rd line free via mo. bill credits. Credits will stop if you cancel any voice lines or change plans.

$46.67/mo.

per phone line for 3 lines with AutoPay, plus taxes and fees. 

You can upgrade your phone every 2 years with our most popular plan. Plus, your monthly price for talk, text, and data is guaranteed for 5 years. Exclusions like taxes and fees apply.

Learn more

Guarantees monthly price of on-network talk, text, & data on an Experience plan. Price with 3rd line free via mo. bill credits. Credits will stop if you cancel any voice lines or change plans.

$30/mo.

per phone line for 3 lines with AutoPay, plus taxes and fees. 

Our lowest price for unlimited talk, text, and data.

Learn more

During congestion, customers on this plan may notice speeds lower than other customers and further reduction if using >50GB/mo., due to data prioritization. Video streams in SD.

Great benefits from the brands you love.

JUNE IS MEMBER MONTH

All month long, we’re turning up what it means to be with T-Mobile.

Check out our perks
Switch to T-Mobile and start enjoying your perks today.
T-SATELLITE

No Towers? No Problem. Off-grid coverage with T-Satellite.

Find out more
Texting & select satellite-ready apps with compatible device in most outdoor areas in the U.S. where you can see the sky. Satellite service, including text to 911, may be delayed, limited, or unavailable. Included with Experience Beyond or $10/mo.; auto renews monthly. Cancel anytime in T-Life App.
HULU ORIGINALS

Stream The Testaments with Hulu On Us.

Learn more
Includes Hulu (with ads) while you maintain a qualifying Experience Beyond line in good standing.
STREAM YOUR FAVORITES
$107/yr value

Netflix On Us.

Learn more
While you maintain one qualifying Experience Beyond or Experience More line in good standing. Compatible device required. Activate up to 4K UHD streaming on capable device, or video typically streams in SD. 
APPLE TV
$119/yr value

MLS, Formula 1®, and Friday Night Baseball, plus hundreds of Apple Originals.

Sign up now
Apple TV just $3/mo. with Experience More or Experience Beyond plan.
SCAM SHIELD

Help block scam calls.

Stop scams before they ever get to you.
Built right into our network, Scam Shield works automatically at no extra cost—stopping scam calls, texts, and sites before they ever hit your phone.

Check out Scam Shield
SMS and MMS only. Qualifying service & capable device required. Turning on Scam Block might block calls you want; disable any time.
T-MOBILE TUESDAYS

Free perks. Epic prizes. Favorite brands. Every week.

Check it out
Limited time. Qualifying plan required. Visit T‑Mobile Tuesdays in the T-Life app for details.
DATA AND TEXTING ABROAD

Stay connected in 215+ countries & destinations.

Check your destination
With qualifying plans. Not for extended international use. Coverage not available in some areas. See plan for details.

If you cancel entire account before receiving 24 credits, credits stop and balance on required finance agreement is due; for phones, contact us. Bill credits end if you pay off device early. For well-qualified customers, plus tax & $35 device connection charge.

MAGENTA STATUS

Magenta Status

FREE TRIAL

Free trial

Hello! Want to stay logged in?

To keep your accounts safe, you'll be automatically logged out in: 

Share your screen while on a call or in store

Get guided support from an Expert in real time

  • For your security, personal info, tabs, and notifications are automatically hidden.
  • You can stop screen sharing at any time.
  • Experts can only see what’s on T-Mobile.com.
  • Don’t use screen share while driving or in any situation where it's unsafe to focus on your screen.

By clicking 'Accept and continue,' you are consenting to allow the Expert to view your screen for assisted navigation. This session may be recorded. To learn more, please visit the  T-Mobile Privacy Notice.

Next: Generate a code to share with your Expert

Share this code with your Expert

code

Once your code has been successfully entered by your Expert, this window will close and continue to the session.

Allow screen sharing with your Expert?

Personal and sensitive data is hidden for your security and privacy.

End your session?

Ending your session will stop sharing your screen, but will not end your call.

Your session has ended

Your screen is no longer being shared with your Expert.

You are already in an active session

Your code has expired

Generate a new one to share with your Expert.
